Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I've already read most of the books here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, are you here to look for a book, too? The ones in this section are a little difficult though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0802_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4009 0 0}Today seems like a good day to simply rest and spend the night in peace and quiet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps I should read a book tonight, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I hear reading has been proven to relieve stress. If you've the time, would you care to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading together with Mitsuru might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4104 0 0}Do you have a book to read? If you'd like, I could lend you something from my collection.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}Oh, would you like to read a book, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then shall we read together? You could choose a book from here if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0802_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4104 0 0}Oh, you're here to read as well? I had assumed you'd be exhausted after the tournament.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I see you're quite engaged in both academics and sports. Let's read together again, shall we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading together with Mitsuru might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are a couple biographies I recommend. What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}If you're not too busy, would you care to join me, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Actually, I'd love to hear your opinion on this one book.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0802_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I know you must be tired after the tournament, but do you have some time to spare tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Actually, I'd love to hear your opinion on this one book.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there's a book[n]Mitsuru wants me to read.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading together with Mitsuru might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whenever you have time is fine. So, what do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}I just wanted to take a break from everything, to just sit down and read...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you care to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0802_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I can't say if it'll be a good change of pace from your tournament, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're in the mood, shall we read together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Mitsuru will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But if I spend time reading with her,[n]my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} might improve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you don't mind, I could lend you another one of my recommendations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}All right, I'll go grab that book for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}I see. Well, let me know if you ever feel like reading together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading together with Mitsuru might[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But it doesn't seem like Mitsuru will gain[n]any more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading together with Mitsuru might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is this about us reading together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Oh, it's you. Do you have some time to spare right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The company heads gifted me some quality tea leaves. I'd be happy to serve you a cup.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}In order to better appreciate the tea blend, it's better to brew enough for two, you see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0616_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Oh, it's you. Do you have some time to spare right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now that the kitchen has been cleaned up, I was considering putting it to use.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I happen to have some quality tea leaves from the company heads. I'd be happy to serve you a cup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0831_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Oh, it's you. Do you have some time to spare right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I happen to have some quality tea leaves from the company heads. I'd like to serve you a cup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_501_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are only five more days until the next full moon... So think of this as a little stress reliever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru asked me to join her for tea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Mitsuru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4066 0 0}If you have the time, would you care to join me for some tea again?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to brew a different blend this time. It also happens to be one of my favorites.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0831_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}There's going to be a full moon soon... Though I doubt you're nervous about it at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you'd like, we could have tea together. I've prepared a different blend from last time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru asked me to join her for tea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Mitsuru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you don't mind, I'd like you to join me for a cup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Ah, {f 4 1}. If you're free, why don't you join me for some tea?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm planning to change things up this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0831_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}. If you're available, how about joining me for some tea?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}With our next battle coming up, it wouldn't be such a bad idea to relax a bit, don't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm planning to change things up this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Mitsuru's quiet determination.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Mitsuru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Before I start brewing the tea, there's something I want to do. Would you like to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I'm thinking of taking a break from everything... A cup of tea would be nice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you like to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Mitsuru will gain any more[n]new skills even if we spend time together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we have any leftovers again, they're all yours. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}Wonderful. I'll start the preparation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}All right. Then let's head to the kitchen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}Oh? Did you want to have some tea after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Mitsuru will gain any more[n]new skills even if we spend time together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Mitsuru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll pour you a cup if you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}
